description: Born from a moment of rediscovery, Pomelo was crafted by the Scent Maverick on the sun‑kissed shores of Parrot Cay. A bright blend of pomelo, rose, and vetiver captures glimmers of sparkling water and endless horizons - a reminder that creativity can always begin again.
imageAlt: Pomelo

description: With Love From London is an ode to transformation, possibility, and the city that inspires both. This limited-edition fragrance captures the spirit of renewal that defines London — its grace, resilience, and quiet allure. Designed for those who see beauty in becoming, it celebrates hope, courage, and imagination. A scent for every woman who dares to ask: What if I could?
imageAlt: With Love From London

description:
BIndulge in the art of fragrance exploration with The Iconic Discovery Set. Choose from 7 exquisite fragrance samples, each crafted to delight your senses and help you uncover your new signature scent. 

Contents: Amber, Lime & Bergamot, Black Cashmeran & Tonka, Golden Gardenia, Cobalt Patchouli & Cedar, Pomelo Oud, Orange Butterflies and Rose & Dates.
imageAlt: The Iconic Discovery Set

description:
A fragrance that tells its own story, Jo by Jo Loves is the Scent Maverick's personal signature - vibrant grapefruit, lime, and spearmint meeting warm woods and black pepper. Confident, modern, and effortlessly you.

Jo's everyday go-to fragrance, which she affectionately refers to it as 'Parfum Jo.' Her olfactory signature, it's as synonymous with her as the iconic Red Dot.
imageAlt: Jo by Jo Loves

description: Amber Lime & Bergamot captures the glamour of the 1920s, inspired by the prestigious Concours d'Elegance event at the Hurlingham Club in London. The fragrance features a captivating blend of citrus, spice, and warm, woody notes, evoking the atmosphere of champagne, gourmet picnics, and the thrill of vintage decadence. This fragrance transports you to a bygone era of elegance and sophistication.
imageAlt: Amber, Lime & Bergamot

description:
Rose & Dates is a fragrance that captures the warmth and energy of Marrakesh. The rich, sensual scent of dates blends with the fresh, delicate note of rose, evoking moments spent wandering through the spice markets, escaping the sun with a refreshing drink, and savouring the beauty of Moroccan traditions.

With Rose & Dates, Jo invites you to experience the magic of Morocco - a place where every scent tells a story.
imageAlt: Rose & Dates

description: Ignite your senses with Jo Loves Pomelo Home Candle, a captivating blend of citrus and floral notes that transports you to sun-kissed beaches. Crafted with love and care, this scented candle is a perfect gift for yourself or a loved one, evoking memories of endless summer days and the joy of creativity. Burn for up to 37.5 hours and let the energising aroma of Pomelo fill your home with warmth and inspiration.
imageAlt: Pomelo, A Home Candle

description: Step into the magic of a spring garden, where every ray of sunlight and every drop of rain awakens the promise of new beginnings. The Jardin de Citrus Layered Candle is a fragrant journey across the world’s most inspiring gardens, each layer revealing a new chapter of renewal and creativity.
imageAlt: Jardin De Citrus, A Layered Candle

description: Indulge in Jo's "Shot of" concept: a luxurious Mango Thai Lime Body Lotion that captures the essence of her Thai holiday, blending succulent mango with zesty lime, enriched with nourishing cocoa butter and vitamin E for silky-smooth skin. Immerse yourself in this tropical delight.
imageAlt: Mango Thai Lime, A Body Lotion

description: Immerse yourself in the invigorating blend of grapefruit, vetiver, and pink pomelo - the iconic scent of Jo - captured in the Pomelo A Luxury Candle. With top notes of pink pomelo and rose, and heart notes of clove and vetiver, this cult favourite fills your home with a refreshing aroma. Enjoy approximately 200 hours of burn time with the Jo Loves Pomelo A Luxury Candle.
imageAlt: Pomelo, A Luxury Candle

description:
Amber, Lime & Bergamot A Luxury Travel Collection is your invitation to escape the ordinary and indulge in the art of refined travel. Housed inside the decadent tortoiseshell travel bag, this set includes A Fragrance Paintbrush™ 7ml, A Bath & Shower Gel 75ml, and A Body Lotion 75ml - treasures available only as part of this luxurious trio. 

Contents: Amber, Lime & Bergamot A Fragrance Paintbrush™, A Body Lotion 75ml and A Bath & Shower Gel 75ml.
imageAlt: Amber, Lime & Bergamot, A Luxury Travel Collection

productName: 18ct Yellow Gold Italian Open Heart Pendant
description: Crafted in radiant 18ct yellow gold; Italian-inspired open heart pendant design; Celebrates timeless sentiment and refined artistry; Elegant silhouette for everyday wear or gifting; Part of Mappin & Webb’s classic gold collection.
imageAlt: 18ct Yellow Gold Italian Open Heart Pendant

productName: Vinea 18ct White Gold 0.66cttw Diamond Floral Earrings
description: 18ct White Gold; 0.66cttw total weight of brilliant cut diamonds; floral inspiration.
imageAlt: Vinea 18ct White Gold 0.66cttw Diamond Floral Earrings

description: 18ct Yellow Gold; 11mm diameter; a touch of classic elegance.
imageAlt: 18ct Yellow Gold 11mm Huge Hoop Earrings

productName: 18ct Yellow Gold Five Stone Emerald & 1.50cttw Diamond Ring
description: A refined expression of Mappin & Webb’s enduring jewellery heritage. Crafted in 18ct yellow gold to frame the radiance of emerald and diamond. Five carefully selected stones arranged in a harmonious, balanced line. A celebration of colour and light within a timeless design tradition. Part of a distinguished range shaped by master craftsmanship and artistry.
imageAlt: 18ct Yellow Gold Five Stone Emerald & 1.50cttw Diamond Ring

productName: 18ct White Gold 1.50cttw Oval Cut Lab Grown Diamond Stud Earrings
description: Part of the Mappin & Webb Lab Grown Diamonds collection, shaped by the House’s long-standing commitment to precision and proportion. The collection reflects a contemporary approach to fine jewellery, guided by established craftsmanship and technical assurance. Oval cut diamonds offer a refined interpretation of brilliance, introducing subtle elongation and visual clarity. The stud earring form is designed for balance and composure, ensuring assured and enduring wear. A modern expression of diamond jewellery, aligned with heritage values and disciplined design.
imageAlt: 18ct White Gold 1.50cttw Oval Cut Lab Grown Diamond Stud Earrings

productName: 18ct Yellow Gold 8x8.5mm Fresh Water Pearl & 0.14cttw Diamond Hoop Earrings
description: Crafted in luminous 18ct yellow gold. Features 8x8.5mm freshwater pearls with natural lustre. Accented by 0.14ct of round brilliant cut diamonds. Combines classic elegance with refined sparkle. Part of Mappin & Webb’s timeless pearl and diamond suite.
imageAlt: 18ct Yellow Gold 8x8.5mm Fresh Water Pearl & 0.14cttw Diamond Hoop Earrings

productName: 18ct Yellow Gold Fresh Water Pearl Fluid Hoop Earrings
description: 18ct Yellow Gold Fresh Water Pearl Fluid Hoop Earrings
imageAlt: 18ct Yellow Gold Fresh Water Pearl Fluid Hoop Earrings

productName: Chopard Ice Cube Ring in Ethical 18ct Yellow Gold
description: Ever since its launch in 1999, the Ice Cube collection has offered successive interpretations of its modern aesthetic inspired by tiny blocks of ice. Symbolising perfection and miraculous geometry, the cube is a source of inspiration in all creative fields. In selecting this figure, the Ice Cube collection dares to play on its rare nature, its disruptive aesthetic, as well as the infinite glinting flashes of light reflected off its multiple facets. Minimalist Elegance
imageAlt: Chopard Ice Cube Ring in Ethical 18ct Yellow Gold

productName: Chopard Mille Miglia Bracelet in Green Rubber and Silver Toned Metal
description: The roar of the racetrack is never far away with this sporty Mille Miglia bracelet on your wrist. A witty play on classic racing car design codes, its green rubber tire tread pattern and polished palladium finish clasp get a final high-octane burst of male energy from the black lacquered Chopard logo.
imageAlt: Chopard Mille Miglia Bracelet in Green Rubber and Silver Toned Metal

description: The roar of the racetrack is never far away with this sporty Mille Miglia bracelet on your wrist. A witty play on classic racing car design codes, its green rubber tire tread pattern and polished palladium finish clasp get a final high-octane burst of male energy from the black lacquered Chopard logo.
imageAlt: Gucci Interlocking Sterling Silver Cufflinks

productName: Angels' Share Eau de Parfum by Kilian, 100ml
description: The Perfume: Much like a Master Perfumer who crafts accords and essences in a perfume, a Master Blender combines the eaux-de-vie in perfect proportions for an exceptional cognac. Angels’ Share contains the essence of Cognac derived from the liquor to lend it a natural caramel color. Opening with cognac oil, upon a blend of oak absolute, cinnamon essence and Tonka bean absolute, the scent’s long-lasting notes of sandalwood, praline and vanilla make for a delicious finish, a rare concoction only angels should experience.
imageAlt: Angels' Share Eau de Parfum by Kilian

productName: Angels' Share Eau de Parfum by Kilian, 250ml
description: The Perfume: Much like a Master Perfumer who crafts accords and essences in a perfume, a Master Blender combines the eaux-de-vie in perfect proportions for an exceptional cognac. Angels’ Share contains the essence of Cognac derived from the liquor to lend it a natural caramel color. Opening with cognac oil, upon a blend of oak absolute, cinnamon essence and Tonka bean absolute, the scent’s long-lasting notes of sandalwood, praline and vanilla make for a delicious finish, a rare concoction only angels should experience.
imageAlt: Angels' Share Eau de Parfum by Kilian

description: Xerjoff, official Silver Sponsor of the Nitto ATP Finals held in Xerjoff’s home city, is proud to present the perfume TORINO21. A vigorously energetic perfume which transports the wearer to the tennis courts. Upliftingly fresh and dynamic, TORINO21 celebrates the accelerated atmosphere of the ATP Finals.
imageAlt: Xerjoff Torino 21 Eau de Parfum

productName: Love Don't Be Shy Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description: Fragrance story: First love’s innocence makes itself known with juicy honeysuckle and plush rose softly caressed by the sweetness of luscious marshmallow sugar accord, satisfying the craving pang of new love. A warm amber base lends a pulsing touch of sensuality, hinting the possibility of soon knowing another soul, inside and out. Each KILIAN bottle is transformed into a precious object. The black-lacquered flacon is engraved on its various sides with a ceramic fresco representing the Achille's shield and decorated with a silver plate where the name of the fragrance has been carved and manually filled with black enamel.
imageAlt: Love Don't Be Shy Eau de Parfum by Kilian

productName: Love Don't Be Shy Eau de Parfum, 250ml
description: Fragrance story: First love’s innocence makes itself known with juicy honeysuckle and plush rose softly caressed by the sweetness of luscious marshmallow sugar accord, satisfying the craving pang of new love. A warm amber base lends a pulsing touch of sensuality, hinting the possibility of soon knowing another soul, inside and out. Each KILIAN bottle is transformed into a precious object. The black-lacquered flacon is engraved on its various sides with a ceramic fresco representing the Achille's shield and decorated with a silver plate where the name of the fragrance has been carved and manually filled with black enamel.
imageAlt: Love Don't Be Shy Eau de Parfum by Kilian

productName: Xerjoff Erba Pura Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description:
Erba Pura is an enticing elixir that captivates and charms.

Fresh, fruity and thoroughly contemporary in spirit, it blends top notes of Sicilian orange and lemon with a Mediterranean fruit basket at the heart. White musk, amber and Madagascar vanilla beans sit at the base and reveal themselves slowly as time goes by.

Rich and mysterious, Erba Pura By Xerjoff celebrates the tactile beauty of velvet. Soft and intense, each scent is evocative of pure luxury.
imageAlt: Xerjoff Erba Pure Eau de Parfum

productName: Princess Eau de Parfum by Kilian, 250ml
description: I DON'T NEED A PRINCE BY MY SIDE TO BE A PRINCESS is a gourmand fragrance to empower the one wearing it. KILIAN Paris wanted to empower women with a unique gourmand scent with a kick. PRINCESS is like sipping on a green tea mocha with a tip of ginger on the nose. Key notes: Ginger, Green Tea, Marshmallow.
imageAlt: Princess Eau de Parfum by Kilian

productName: Tom Ford Tobacco Vanille Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description:
Opulent. Warm. Iconic.

Tom Ford's affection for london inspired this scent, reminiscent of an english gentlemen's club, redolent with spice. He reinvents a classic fragrance genre by adding creamy tonka bean, vanilla, cocoa, dry fruit accords and sweet wood sap for a modern, opulent, and almost heady impression that's all man, unless worn by a woman.
imageAlt: Tom Ford Tobacco Vanille Eau de Parfum

productName: Tom Ford Fucking Fabulous Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description:
Vibrant clary sage and fresh lavender command attention with aromatic foreplay. Bitter almond and notes of vanilla infuse textural richness to the leather heart, intensified by floral orris accord. Tonka bean drives the scent as amber undertones and blonde woods accords reverberate with a warm glow.

With a name that says it all, Fucking Fabulous is a decadent and spicy leather scent that wields an intoxicating grip.
imageAlt: Tom Ford Fucking Fabulous Eau de Parfum

productName: Tom Ford Noir de Noir Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description:
Dark. Sexy. Indulgent.

Encompassing and celebrating the yin and the yang, this rich oriental scent reveals Tom Ford's feminine side. rich feminine florals and the masculine earthiness of black truffle, vanilla, patchouli, oud wood, and tree moss add a warm sensuality to this dark chypre oriental.
imageAlt: Tom Ford Noir de Noir Eau de Parfum

productName: Tom Ford Noir de Noir Eau de Parfum, 250ml
description:
Dark. Sexy. Indulgent.

Encompassing and celebrating the yin and the yang, this rich oriental scent reveals Tom Ford's feminine side. rich feminine florals and the masculine earthiness of black truffle, vanilla, patchouli, oud wood, and tree moss add a warm sensuality to this dark chypre oriental.
imageAlt: Tom Ford Noir de Noir Eau de Parfum

description:
An 18ct white gold full eternity/wedding ring with round brilliant cut claw set diamonds going all the way around, forming a complete circle.

The displayed carat weight is based on a size N ring-size and will vary depending on ring size, with smaller finger sizes having a slightly lower carat weight and larger finger sizes having a slightly higher carat weight.

Please note, this ring cannot be resized, so if the size purchased is incorrect, we will have to remake it for you as part of our resizing policy. We kindly ask you to please try to obtain the correct size before ordering.

The diamonds weigh a total of 1.00ct and are all E-VS2 quality.

productName: Never Act Your Age Female Card
description:
Send this birthday card to that one person who quite rightly refuses to grow up, and why should they? Age is all a state of mind and if you can dress the part go for it.

A bright yellow birthday card featuring a trendy elderly lady in a bright red jacket and big sunglasses. Bold pink and blue text above her reads Never grow up.
imageAlt: Never Act Your Age Female Card

description:
Here's the perfect colourful birthday card for that Sugar tits in your life. What you mean there isn't one... You need to get one straight away!

A rainbow birthday card with a smiling 1970s woman with large sunglasses surrounded by curvy white text above her that reads Happy Birthday sugar tits.
imageAlt: Sugar Tits Card

productName: Happy Birthday You Sexy Beast Card
description:
Shirt unbuttoned down to the navel. Big gold bling round the neck. Struts their stuff in nothing but a speedo on the beach. Yep, that’s them alright, they are the sexy beast you know, and it’s their birthday.

A birthday card with a picture of an overweight, suntanned man on the beach with a big gold medallion.
White text above him reads Happy birthday you sexy beast.
imageAlt: Happy Birthday You Sexy Beast Card

productName: My Favourite Food Group Is Wine Card
description:
Carbohydrates, Protein, Sugar, Wine!!! We can all be boring and choose fibre or something worthy or we can just be honest with ourselves (especially on a Friday night) and choose wine as that food group which does us the best. Now all you have to decide is red, white or rose.

A greeting card with a retro picture of a glamorous woman standing up and holding a glass of wine. Text in front of her reads My favourite food group is wine.
imageAlt: My Favourite Food Group Is Wine Card

productName: Wake Up Be Fabulous Repeat Card
description:
Sometimes you just need to seize the day and be fabulous! There's always someone who leaps out of bed with such gay abandon and is far too fabulous for that time of the morning. Nauseating isn't well, well this bright fabulous card might just be for them.

A birthday card with a photo of 1970s aerobic dancers in front of a rainbow pattern. Text above reads Wake Up Be fabulous Repeat.
imageAlt: Wake Up Be Fabulous Repeat Card

productName: Hope Your Birthday Is As Gay As You Card
description:
Hope your Birthday is as gay as you

A birthday card with a photo of a 1960s camply dressed man. Rainbow coloured text on the card reads Hope your birthday is as gay as you.
imageAlt: Hope Your Birthday Is As Gay As You Card

description:
Send this birthday card to that one person who quite rightly refuses to grow up, and why should they? Age is all a state of mind and if you can dress the part go for it.

A bright yellow birthday card featuring a trendy elderly man in a hawaiian shirt and big sunglasses. Bold pink and blue text above her reads Never grow up.
imageAlt: Never Act Your Age Male Card

productName: Of Course Size Matters No One Wants a Small Glass of Wine Card
description:
Size matters for so many things, most of which are far too rude for this family friendly website but when it comes to wine that's one that which we can all agree! No matter what time of day, get that nice big glass, open a bottle of whatever you fancy (even if it's Liebfraumilch) and pour yourself something that certainly isn't no tiddler.

A greeting card with a picture of a 1970s sultry looking woman holding a small drink. White text surrounding her reads Of course size matters. No one wants a small glass of wine.
imageAlt: Of Course Size Matters No One Wants a Small Glass of Wine Card

description:
Are you the kind of person that get's even more excited about somebody else's birthday than they do? This might just be the perfect card for you to give to them. Just try and keep that excitement under control.

A funny birthday card featuring a 1950's excited woman holding her hands up to her face in front of rainbow starburst pattern. Rounded curving text above her reads Well tickle my tits, it's your birthday.
imageAlt: Tickle My Tits Card

description:
Do you have a friend who's starting to go a little grey down in their special area? This birthday card might be the prefect reminder they're on that slippery slope.

A birthday card with a 1950s picture of an excited elderly woman. Bold white and yellow rounded text above her reads Happy birthday saggy tits.
imageAlt: Happy Birthday Saggy Tits Card

description: The TruffleHunter Truffle Oil Selection is a premium gift set featuring three of our finest truffle-infused oils: White Truffle Oil, English Truffle Oil, and Black Truffle Oil. Each oil is crafted with real truffles and high-quality ingredients, including cold-pressed olive oil and British rapeseed oil, to deliver bold, aromatic flavour. Beautifully packaged, this set is ideal for gifting or elevating your own culinary creations.
imageAlt: Truffle Oil Selection

description: The TruffleHunter Truffle Condiment Discovery Range is a luxurious gift set featuring six of our most flavour-packed gourmet essentials. This indulgent selection includes Black Truffle Mustard, Black Truffle Mayonnaise, Black Truffle Ketchup, Black Truffle Sea Salt, Truffle Dust, and White Truffle Honey. Each product is crafted with real truffles and premium ingredients, offering a versatile range of flavours to elevate everyday meals.
imageAlt: Truffle Condiment Discovery Range

description: TruffleHunter Black Truffle Slices are made from carefully selected black truffles, thinly sliced and preserved in extra virgin olive oil to maintain their rich aroma and firm texture. This gourmet ingredient offers a convenient way to enjoy the luxurious flavour of truffles in your everyday cooking.
imageAlt: Black Truffle Slices

description: The TruffleHunter Essential Truffle Collection is a refined gift set featuring four of our most iconic gourmet products. This elegant selection includes White Truffle Oil, Black Truffle Oil, White Truffle Honey, and Black Truffle Sea Salt, each crafted to deliver the unmistakable flavour of real truffle. Perfectly packaged for gifting or personal indulgence, it€ž¢s the ideal introduction to the world of truffle luxury.
imageAlt: Essential Truffle Collection

description:
Indulge someone special or treat yourself with the ultimate gourmet gift: our Truffle Seasoning Gift Set, featuring two luxurious truffle products that transform everyday meals into five-star experiences.

Black Truffle Sea Salt - A rich blend of sea salt infused with real black truffle. Perfect for finishing steaks, pasta, eggs, popcorn, and roasted vegetables.
Truffle Dust - A bold, umami-packed fine textured powder providing the distinct flavour of black truffle to any dish.
Crafted for versatility and indulgence, this set brings the earthy, aromatic flavour of truffles to everyday dishes. Whether you're shopping for a foodie gift, a holiday present, or a hostess gift, this beautifully packaged duo is guaranteed to impress. Its a thoughtful choice for birthdays, anniversaries, Christmas, or corporate gifting.
imageAlt: Truffle Seasoning Set

description: The TruffleHunter Truffle Shaver is a professional-grade slicing tool crafted in Italy from premium rosewood and stainless steel. Designed for precision and elegance, this adjustable truffle slicer allows you to shave fresh truffles with ease and accuracy, delivering paper-thin slices that showcase the beauty and flavour of this gourmet delicacy.
imageAlt: Truffle Shaver Italian Rosewood

description: The TruffleHunter Ultimate Truffle Collection is the definitive gift set for truffle lovers, featuring a curated selection of our finest gourmet products. This luxurious collection includes; White Truffle Oil, Black Truffle Oil, White Truffle Honey, Black Truffle Mustard, Black Truffle Mayonnaise, Black Truffle Hot Sauce, Black Truffle BBQ Sauce, Black Truffle Ketchup, Black Truffle Sea Salt, and Truffle Dust. Beautifully packaged and bursting with flavour, its the perfect indulgence for foodies and home chefs alike.
imageAlt: Ultimate Truffle Collection

description: The TruffleHunter Classic Truffle Set is a luxurious pairing of two gourmet essentials: Black Truffle Oil and Black Truffle Dust. Crafted for culinary enthusiasts, this elegant gift set delivers bold truffle flavour in versatile formats perfect for elevating everyday dishes with a touch of indulgence.
imageAlt: Classic Truffle Set

description: The TruffleHunter Signature Hamper is a refined gift set featuring eight of our most celebrated truffle products, beautifully presented in a classic wicker basket. Designed for discerning food lovers, this hamper delivers a gourmet truffle experience that's perfect for gifting or indulging in yourself.
imageAlt: TruffleHunter Signature 8-Piece Hamper

description: The Truffle Lovers Hamper is the ultimate gift for any gourmet enthusiast. Beautifully presented in a premium wicker basket, this 15-piece collection features a curated selection of TruffleHunter's best-selling truffle products from oils and condiments to preserves and seasonings. Whether you're gifting a foodie or treating yourself, this hamper delivers a luxurious truffle experience in every bite.
imageAlt: Truffle Lovers 15-Piece Hamper

description:
Our Geode Sneakers are made for modern manifestors, with a Citrine crystal embedded in the sole, to help you tap into an abundance of prosperous natural energies.

Citrine is often called the ‘abundance’ stone and is associated with wealth-creation, prosperity and positive thinking. By connecting your body to these natural energies you may walk with a confident, positive mindset, wherever your journey takes you.

Made with a cushioned terry-lined inner sole for optimum comfort and depending on the style, a combination of cow suede and full grain Nappa leather and mesh. Also featuring our signature Celestial star rubber sole, the Geode has a heel height of 3.2cm.

Our sneakers fit true to size however, as we do not offer half sizes we recommend sizing down to your nearest full size.

These versatile and durable sneakers are designed for leisure activities and everyday wear. Whether on the go or relaxing at home, they’re the perfect way to stay connected with abundance, prosperity and positivity.
imageAlt: Geode Manifest Sneaker in White/Leather

description:
CTRNE Connect Trainers are made for modern movers who crave balance, clarity and connection.

Designed with innovative technology integrated within the sole, these trainers are created to support a more mindful and connected way of moving through the day. Every step is designed to help you feel centred, focused and in tune with your surroundings, bringing greater ease and intention to everyday life.

Crafted with a cushioned inner sole for exceptional comfort and a thoughtfully designed upper that combines premium materials for breathability and durability, CTRNE Connect delivers effortless wear from morning to night. Finished with our signature rubber sole and a heel height of 5.5cm, every detail has been considered to provide lasting support and comfort.

Built for everyday wear, leisure and movement, CTRNE Connect trainers are your go-to for feeling balanced, comfortable and connected, wherever life takes you.
imageAlt: CTRNE Connect Sneaker Cloud Dancer

description:
CTRNE Connect Grounding Trainers are made for modern movers who crave balance, clarity and connection. 

Instead of crystals, these trainers feature innovative grounding technology within the sole, helping to align your body with the earth’s natural energy as you walk.
Grounding is believed to help calm the nervous system, reduce stress, sharpen focus and restore a sense of balance by reconnecting the body to the earth’s natural electrical energy. This connection is thought to support physical wellbeing too, with grounding linked to reduced inflammation, improved circulation, better sleep quality and faster recovery from daily strain.

By staying grounded, you may move through life feeling more stable, clear-headed and energised - wherever your journey takes you. Crafted with a cushioned inner sole for superior comfort and a thoughtfully designed upper combining premium materials for breathability and durability. Finished with our signature rubber sole and a heel height of 5.5cm, CTRNE Connect is designed to support you from the ground up.

Built for everyday wear, leisure and movement, CTRNE Connect trainers are your go-to for staying grounded, balanced and connected - step by step.
imageAlt: CTRNE Connect Grounding Sneaker in Grey/White

description:
Designed for movement without compromise, the Vibe Shorts combine lightweight performance with everyday versatility. Crafted from breathable, quick-drying fabric, they deliver unrestricted comfort through intense training sessions, days on the court, recovery days and everything in between. A streamlined athletic fit and subtle CTRNE branding create a clean, confident silhouette built to keep pace with your lifestyle.

Features:
Ultra-light, quick-dry fabric that keeps you cool
Articulated construction for freedom in every direction
Side and back pockets for convenient storage

Move freely. Perform effortlessly. Own every moment.
imageAlt: CTRNE Vibe Shorts Sand

description: Created to match your energy, the Vibe Tee delivers the perfect balance of comfort, performance and understated style. The lightweight, breathable fabric feels soft against the skin while maintaining a structured athletic fit that moves naturally with your body. Finished with subtle CTRNE branding, it's designed to perform when you're active and look effortless when you're not.

Elevate your fashion game and make a statement that captures the essence of sophistication with the Coralie Pear Pendant Necklace.

This gorgeous necklace showcases a brilliant pear-shaped, prong-set Blue Swarovski center stone accented by sparkling brilliant-cut pavé. Crafted in your choice of 18k yellow gold or rhodium-plated sustainable brass and finished with a lobster clasp for secure wear.
imageAlt: Coralie Pear Pendant Necklace

description:
Make a bold statement with the Coralie Ear Cuff Earrings.
 
They showcase an oval silhouette and an attached ear cuff, enhanced by cascading pear-shaped blue crystals.
 
These stunning colored earrings are a celebration of daring style and refined elegance, ideal for anyone looking to add a touch of grandeur to their look.
imageAlt: Coralie Ear Cuff Earrings

description:
Get swept away by the grandeur of Versailles with our Fèlicitè Cluster Earrings.

These statement multi-colored earrings, adorned with white, purple, red, and green crystals, echo the lavishness of royal garden blooms.
They are the perfect mix of old-world charm and contemporary chic, bringing a touch of 'Le Jardin des Délices' elegance right to your style.

Ideal for those who adore a blend of historical luxury and modern flair.
imageAlt: Fèlicitè Cluster Earrings

description:
Capture the effortless chic of the French Riviera with our Odette Drop Statement Earrings. 
 
Decked in a dazzling medley of white, blue, peridot, and ruby crystals, these gorgeous multi-color earrings are your passport to the laid-back luxury of Mediterranean soirees and sun-kissed terraces.
imageAlt: Odette Drop Statement Earrings

description: Ideal for adding a touch of luxury to any outfit, the Ambroise 3 Strand Necklace is perfect for special occasions or everyday wear. Swarovski crystals add brilliance and sparkle, while the bezel setting ensures the stones are securely in place. The lobster claw clasp makes this stunning long necklace easy to put on and take off.
imageAlt: Ambroise 3 Strand Necklace

description: The Anaé Large Paperclip Chain Necklace is beautifully crafted in 18k gold-plated brass; it features a paperclip chain style accented by hexagon-shaped Swarovski crystals and fastened with a sturdy lobster clasp.
imageAlt: Anaé Large Paperclip Chain Necklace

description:
Bring your look to the next level with the Morgane Bezel Strand Necklace.
 
This intricate design features a playful crystal scenario, all set in our signature high-quality brass dipped in a thick layer of either 18k yellow gold, rose, or rhodium plating for a high-gloss, long-lasting shine.
imageAlt: Morgane Bezel Strand Necklace

description:
Step into the spotlight with large puffy hoop earrings that redefine modern luxury.
 
The Daphné Extra Large Puffy Hoops, crafted from premium sustainable brass and coated in 18k gold plating, are the ultimate accessory to elevate any outfit. Their lightweight design ensures lasting comfort, while the secure latch-backs offer peace of mind
imageAlt: Daphné Extra Large Puffy Hoops

description:
The it-girl version of a traditional Tennis necklace. #BonheurMade  
 
The Milou Bezel Set Tennis Necklace boasts hexagonal and princess-cut Swarovski crystals bezel set in 100% solid brass, dipped in your choice of 18kt yellow gold, rose gold or rhodium for lustrous shine and endless wear.
imageAlt: Milou Bezel Set Tennis Necklace

description: Meet the Daphne Cuff Choker: an architectural centerpiece designed for the modern minimalist. Though it boasts a voluminous, high-impact profile, its hollow-core construction ensures a weightless feel for effortless, all-day wear. Finished with a liquid-like high polish, this sculptural necklace catches the light from every curve, offering a bold statement whether worn against bare skin or layered over a sleek knit.
imageAlt: Daphné Cuff Choker

productName: Anthbot M5 Compact Wire-Free Smart Lawn Mower with Garage
description: Designed for urban and suburban lawns up to 500m², the M5 Series delivers professional-grade performance in an ultra-compact body. Its agile frame and AI-driven navigation master narrow passages and tight corners with ease. With a 10-minute wire-free setup and full App control, the M5 is the smart, effortless choice for homeowners who want a carpet-like lawn without the work. Easily navigates narrow passages and tight spaces. 10-Minute Wire-Free Setup, Saving Your Time. Delivers clean, precise trims right up to the lawn’s edge. App-Adjusted Cutting Height. RTK + Vision + 4G Full-Yard Coverage
imageAlt: Anthbot M5 Compact Wire-Free Smart Lawn Mower

productName: Anthbot M9 Compact Wire-Free Smart Lawn Mower
description: Designed for urban and suburban lawns up to 1000m², the M9 Series delivers professional-grade performance in an ultra-compact body. Its agile frame and AI-driven navigation master narrow passages and tight corners with ease. With a 10-minute wire-free setup and full App control, the M9 is the smart, effortless choice for homeowners who want a carpet-like lawn without the work. Easily navigates narrow passages and tight spaces. 10-Minute Wire-Free Setup, Saving Your Time. Delivers clean, precise trims right up to the lawn’s edge. App-Adjusted Cutting Height. RTK + Vision + 4G Full-Yard Coverage
imageAlt: Anthbot M9 Compact Wire-Free Smart Lawn Mower

productName: Anthbot N8 Mow, Mulche, Collect, Sweep Robotic Mower
description: Designed for lawns up to 1500m², the N8 Series is a 4-in-1 robot mower that effortlessly mows, mulches, collects, and sweeps. With a 23L auto-dumping bin and smart AI navigation, it delivers a flawless, carpet-like finish—completely hands-free and family-safe. Cuts, mulches, collects, and sweeps for a neat lawn. Smart multi-zone navigation for unhindered continuous mowing. Precision cutting 4,000 RPM blades with U-path logic for carpet-like finish. Auto detect, navigate, and dump clippings & large 23L bag. Full-band RTK, dual vision, for reliable signal coverage. Efficient leaf clearing and fine grass shredding enrich soil fertility.
imageAlt: Anthbot N8 Mow, Mulche, Collect, Sweep Robotic Mower

productName: Anthbot M5 Lidar Compact 360° LiDAR Smart Mower
description: Professional-grade mowing for compact, enclosed gardens up to 500m². Its 360° LiDAR + Dual Vision navigation easily handles narrow passages, shaded areas, and tight corners. Drop & Mow in just 3 minutes—no wires, no RTK required—and create a flawless lawn effortlessly with one-touch mapping. Drop & Mow: Ready in 3 Minutes, No Wires. 360° LiDAR + Dual Vision for Precise Mapping. AI Obstacle Avoidance: Navigates 1000+ Objects. Edge Cutting & Smart Scheduling, Effortless Lawn Care. Safe Indoor Charging, Always Ready to Mow
imageAlt: Anthbot M5 Lidar Compact 360° LiDAR Smart Mower

description: Mowing efficiency is more than 3 times that of similar products. High-precision real-time mapping, full-range mowing path planning, better lawn care. Precise boundary wire break detection and reminder. Simple fencing method, easy operation. Intelligent automatic mowing height adjustment. Handle slopes up to 45% (24°). Automatic positioning and continued mowing after mowing interruption. Controllable fixed-point mowing. Pre-purchase reminder: The maximum length of the perimeter is 180m, please complete the wiring within the 180m perimeter (The maximum fenced area of ​​uneven grass is about 600㎡/0.15 acre). If you need to expand a larger area, you can purchase an additional charging station + boundary wire
imageAlt: Anthbot Pion Robot Mower

productName: Anthbot Genie 1000 AI Robot Lawn Mower Smart AI Robot Lawn Mower - No Wire
description: Working Principle: Genie uses GPS positioning and 4-camera recognition technology to map your lawn and automatically mow within the mapped area. Easy Installation: Just a few simple steps for installation, no complicated wiring required. Easy Mapping: Switch between automatic mapping and remote control mapping modes at any time. Strong GPS Signal: Exclusive RTK technology ensures uninterrupted signal, unaffected by environmental factors. Multi-zone Management: Create multiple separate maps to manage complex lawns. Intelligent Obstacle Avoidance: With 300° "human-like" vision and 360° collision sensing, it can perfectly avoid over 1,000 objects, ensuring the safety of people and animals. Intelligent Custodian: Let Genie become a lawn butler and automatically maintain a perfect lawn. APP Control: Use the APP to remotely monitor and manage your mowing plan.
imageAlt: Anthbot Genie 1000 AI Robot Lawn Mower Smart AI Robot Lawn Mower - No Wire
